mentions.note: Excellent company, derivative play (special chips competing with Nvidia, Nvidia partner). Currently out of favor—market buying shortage plays (SanDisk, WDC), selling non-shortage (Marvell, Broadcom, Nvidia). CEO Matt Murphy fabulous but sentiment is wrong.
Reports Thursday; CEO Matt Murphy money-good player; partnerships with AWS (selling out of chips); phenomenal Amazon deal; buy ahead of earnings; if drops Monday/Tuesday, buy more.
Amazing quarter reported tonight; poised to soar if Trump administration reverses chip export restrictions.

Crushed earnings + blowout guidance; Q rev +22% YoY beat; FY2027 guidance +30% revenue (~$11B vs Street $10B), EPS >$5, data center +40%, interconnect +50%; Amazon custom processor business growing 20%+; all 5 major US hyperscalers as customers; record bookings, all-time design wins; trading <18x 2027E earnings despite 18% pop; much more upside; CEO Matt Murphy proved he is 'the signal'.
Received $2B from Nvidia for joint AI infrastructure development; benefits from customer migration from non-Nvidia platforms to ecosystem.

Competitive risk to parabolic semiconductor stocks; potential disruption from AMD, Applied Optoelectronics, Astera Labs. Threat to high-flying positions.

Total winner; caller up 75% in 2 months; play with house money, let it run, consider taking some off at 200.
